title: Control Alt Games Platform & Solo-Operator Workflow (Proscenium Stage, Vellum Vault, Eidolon Art, Mneme Lore, and Godot Runtimes)
problem: Solo game development across Control Alt Games requires operating as a creative director without manual developer bookkeeping or technical 3D pipeline friction. Today's systems (Vellum asset vault, Proscenium presentation stage, Eidolon concept art, Mneme lore library, LCARD operator controls, and Godot game repos) operate as isolated silos, requiring manual hand-offs, manual CLI commands, and lacking a unified solo-operator workflow across stage presentation, concept art, lore briefs, asset conversion, and automated engine delivery.
desired_outcome: A unified, machine-owned Control Alt Games platform and workflow reusing 90% of existing infrastructure: Vellum (:8770) converts and vaults 3D/audio assets via its SQLite job queue; Proscenium (:8788) acts as the home presentation authority and live stage viewport via delivery.py and overlay-apk; Eidolon (:7860) and Mneme (:8790) supply concept art and lore briefs for Bandit (1st priority) and Threshold Affairs (2nd priority), with Field Ops pipeline-ready; automated background sync delivers manifested assets directly into Godot repos on dev-ubuntu; and headless engine validation guarantees 0 import errors.
constraints: Priority sequence: Bandit first, Threshold Affairs second, Field Ops pipeline-ready.
Field Ops (godot-field-ops) and Threshold Affairs (godot-threshold-affairs) are separate, independent game targets.

Proscenium (:8788) presentation display targets are configurable per game and toggleable via LCARD controls (Bandit defaults to arcade/overlay-apk; Threshold Affairs to operator-screen/living-room-tv).
Headless Godot import errors on dev-ubuntu trigger Soft Quarantine (moving bad files to .quarantine/, keeping healthy assets online, and surfacing alerts on /api/ops/pulse).
Vellum (:8770) stores bytes, not prose, and executes lane_sync / headless_verify jobs via backend/jobs.py SQLite queue.
Vault I/O off the press host is strictly HTTP-only.
Pack intake, lane sync, and headless engine validation must be 100% machine-owned without operator bookkeeping.
Reuse existing platform utilities (Proscenium delivery.py, Vellum jobs.py, Axiom apps.registry.yaml, Mneme documents API, Eidolon batches API) before creating new code.
Record all scope, context, and work in durable CFD records mirrored in git.
acceptance_signals: Governing CFD inspiration and plan are canonized in git with empirical discovery findings.
Proscenium presentation delivery target registry (delivery-targets.json) includes godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs capabilities with per-game target defaults and LCARD control overrides.
Vellum SQLite job engine (jobs.py) executes lane_sync and headless_verify job kinds with Soft Quarantine error handling.
Machine-owned background sync delivers published Vellum assets directly to Field Ops and Threshold Affairs repos on dev-ubuntu.
Automated headless Godot import scanning (godot --headless) verifies 0 import errors and updates /api/ops/pulse.
Axiom Studio Leaf presents unified production briefs prioritized for Bandit and Threshold Affairs.

non_negotiables: Priority order: Bandit -> Threshold Affairs -> Field Ops (ready)
Proscenium display targets are configurable per game and toggleable via LCARD
Soft Quarantine policy for bad asset imports (.quarantine/ directory + /api/ops/pulse alerts)
Keep Field Ops and Threshold Affairs completely independent
Reuse Proscenium delivery.py for presentation, Hails, and display target routing
Reuse Vellum jobs.py SQLite queue for machine-owned lane_sync and headless_verify jobs
All pipeline delivery and engine verification must be machine-owned
rejected_approaches: Asking human operators to manually copy files or run CLI commands
Re-inventing presentation routers or job queues already built in Proscenium and Vellum
Collapsing Proscenium, Vellum, Eidolon, or Mneme boundaries into a monolith
Relying on chat memory instead of durable CFD records
requests: Supplement Governing CFD with empirical discovery findings
Integrate Proscenium, Vellum, Eidolon, Mneme, and LCARD
Automate lane delivery and headless Godot verification on dev-ubuntu

plan.title: Control Alt Games Platform & Solo-Operator Workflow Plan
plan.summary: Unified platform plan orchestrating Proscenium (:8788), Vellum (:8770), Eidolon (:7860), Mneme (:8790), LCARD (:8184), and Godot 4.x game runtimes (Field Ops & Threshold Affairs) under Axiom governance, reusing existing Proscenium delivery.py and Vellum jobs.py infrastructure.

phases.title: Phase 1: Inter-System Architecture & Proscenium Presentation Contracts
phases.summary: Establish formal API contracts between Proscenium (:8788), Vellum (:8770), Eidolon (:7860), Mneme (:8790), and LCARD (:8184), leveraging Proscenium's existing delivery.py router.

tasks.title: Canonize Governing CFD record and Dev Tracker in git with discovery evidence
tasks.description: Store governing-inspiration.json and DEV_TRACKER.md in git to preserve context across agent sessions.
acceptance: DEV_TRACKER.md updated with empirical discovery findings

tasks.title: Update Proscenium delivery-targets.json for Field Ops & Threshold Affairs
tasks.description: Register godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs product capabilities in Proscenium's delivery-targets.json and define event payloads for POST /api/presentation/products/{product_id}/show.
acceptance: godot-field-ops and godot-threshold-affairs registered in Proscenium delivery-targets.json
Tactical and investigative Hails payload schema documented

phases.title: Phase 2: Machine-Owned Lane Delivery Engine (Vellum Jobs Integration)
phases.summary: Extend Vellum's SQLite job queue (backend/jobs.py) with lane_sync job kind to deliver published Vellum elements directly to Field Ops and Threshold Affairs project roots on dev-ubuntu.

tasks.title: Implement lane_sync job kind in Vellum backend/jobs.py
tasks.description: Add lane_sync automatable job kind to Vellum's job queue, executing automated asset sync to res://assets/vellum/ in game project checkouts on dev-ubuntu.
acceptance: lane_sync job kind registered in Vellum backend/jobs.py
Assets automatically sync to dev-ubuntu game repos on publish

phases.title: Phase 3: Headless Engine Import & Quality Verification
phases.summary: Implement headless_verify job kind in Vellum's job queue executing godot --headless -e --quit on dev-ubuntu and reporting clean imports / errors to /api/ops/pulse.

tasks.title: Implement headless_verify job kind for Godot projects
tasks.description: Execute godot --headless on synced game project checkouts, parse import stdout/stderr, and report status to Vellum /api/ops/pulse.
acceptance: headless_verify job kind registered in Vellum backend/jobs.py
Import exceptions surfaced in Vellum and Axiom ops dashboard

phases.title: Phase 4: Proscenium Stage & Presentation Integration for Dobsonian Games
phases.summary: Wire game event stings from Field Ops and Threshold Affairs into Proscenium display targets (overlay-apk / Android TV & room displays).

tasks.title: Wire game event notifications into Proscenium Hails renderer
tasks.description: Connect in-game objective and clue triggers to Proscenium POST /api/presentation/products/{product_id}/show via Proscenium's delivery.py.
acceptance: Field Ops objective triggers render tactical Hails on Proscenium stage
Threshold Affairs discovery triggers render mystery stingers on Proscenium stage

phases.title: Phase 5: Axiom Studio Leaf & Unified Production Briefs
phases.summary: Deliver Axiom Studio Leaf (praxis-games) combining Eidolon concept art, Mneme lore notes, Vellum 3D assets, and Proscenium stage previews.

tasks.title: Deliver Axiom Studio Leaf UI for solo game production
tasks.description: Create Axiom embedded leaf app presenting unified production briefs, Proscenium stage previews, and live game pipeline health.
acceptance: Axiom Studio Leaf registered in config/apps.registry.yaml
Unified production brief view presents Eidolon art + Mneme lore + Vellum assets + Proscenium stage
